title: quercus setulosa subsp. laotica
intro: Quercus setulosa subsp. laotica, also known as the Laotian oak or Lao sawtooth oak, is a plant species within the Quercus setulosa complex. This plant has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine, and it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Quercus setulosa subsp. laotica include its ability to aid in the treatment of various ailments, such as fever, cough, and digestive issues, due to its rich content of polyphenols and flavonoids. Herbal preparations of Quercus setulosa subsp. laotica can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
